typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	CombinedTable as string (),
	PrimaryKeyStr as string (),
	Type1Table as string (),
	Type2Table as string ()
}

source(output(
		ETLHashKey as string,
		Notes as string,
		JobID as integer,
		TimeStampField as string,
		StageID as integer,
		SortOrder as short,
		StageRef as string,
		StageDescription as string,
		StartDate as timestamp,
		TargetDate as timestamp,
		DateComplete as timestamp,
		Milestone as boolean,
		StaffID as integer,
		PrecedingStageID as integer,
		Ignore as boolean,
		TimeCheck as long,
		TimeCheckDone as boolean,
		EstHoursToFinish as decimal(19,19),
		StageTypeID as integer,
		StageType as string
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT * FROM stg.StageDimension WHERE StageID IN (SELECT TableID FROM ##tmpNonCurrentIDs)',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> OLEDBSource
OLEDBSource derive(ETLCreatedBy = toString($System__UserName),
		ETLDateCreated = currentDate(),
		ETLUpdatedBy = toString($System__UserName),
		IsCurrent = 'Y',
		ETLDateUpdated = currentDate()) ~> DerivedColumn
DerivedColumn derive(IsCurrent = toString(IsCurrent)) ~> DataConversion1
DataConversion1 sink(input(
		IsCurrent as string,
		Ignore as boolean,
		StaffID as integer,
		ETLLastUpdate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ETLUpdatedBy as string,
		EstHoursToFinish as decimal(0,0),
		TimeCheck as long,
		ETLHashKey as string,
		StartDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		StageDescription as string,
		PrecedingStageID as integer,
		StageType as string,
		DateComplete as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		TimeCheckDone as boolean,
		Notes as string,
		StageRef as string,
		Milestone as boolean,
		StageID as integer,
		SortOrder as short,
		ETLDateCreated as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		StageTypeID as integer,
		TimeStampField as string,
		TargetDate as timestamp 'dd-MM-yyyy',
		ETLCreatedBy as string,
		JobID as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		IsCurrent,
		Ignore,
		StaffID,
		ETLLastUpdate = ETLDateUpdated,
		ETLUpdatedBy,
		EstHoursToFinish,
		TimeCheck,
		ETLHashKey,
		StartDate,
		StageDescription,
		PrecedingStageID,
		StageType,
		DateComplete,
		TimeCheckDone,
		Notes,
		StageRef,
		Milestone,
		StageID,
		SortOrder,
		ETLDateCreated,
		StageTypeID,
		TimeStampField,
		TargetDate,
		ETLCreatedBy,
		JobID)) ~> OLEDBDestination
